## Hive Beast Mercenaries

#### 0-2 Giant Rat (Cost: 1 Glory)

A Necromunda Gang (House Cawdor) Warband cannot take the mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Giant Rat | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+0 | 0 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Giant Rat has no battlekit, but it is always considered to be equipped with a Close Combat Weapon. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

**Abilities**

* **Dodge.** All attacks against the Giant Rat have \-1 DICE to Hit.  
* **Expendable.** The Giant Rat is not counted as part of your Warband for the purposes of Morale.  
* **Pet.** Select one other non-ARTIFICIAL, non-BEAST model in your Warband at the start of the battle. The Giant Rat forms a FIRETEAM with that model. That model is its owner.  
* **Skitter.** The Giant Rat has \+1 DICE to all Climb, Dash, and Jump Success Rolls.  
* **Tiny.** Injury rolls made against the Giant Rat have \+1 DICE.

**Keywords**  
BEAST, NO PROMOTION, STEALTH

#### 0-2 Grapplehawk (Cost: 2 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Grapplehawk | 8”/Flying | N/A | \+1 | 0 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Grapplehawk is equipped with only its Talons. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Talons.** Melee, CRITICAL.

**Abilities**

* **Grapple.** When the Grapplehawk hits an enemy with a melee attack, it attaches to that enemy until it attacks another target or they are no longer in melee combat with one another. While attached to an enemy, the Grapplehawk has \+2 DICE to Hit that model.  
* **Pet.** Select one other non-ARTIFICIAL, non-BEAST model in your Warband at the start of the battle. The Grapplehawk forms a FIRETEAM with that model. That model is its owner.

**Keywords**  
BEAST, FLYING, NO PROMOTION

#### 0-1 Gyrinx Cat (Cost: 2 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Gyrinx Cat | 8”/Infantry | N/A | \+1 | 0 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Gyrinx Cat has no battlekit. It is always considered to be equipped with a Close Combat Weapon. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

**Abilities**

* **Wyrd Power.** At the start of the battle, roll for a random Shared Psychic Discipline, and one random Power from that Discipline. The Grynx Cat knows that power until the end of the battle.

**Keywords**  
BEAST, NO PROMOTION, PSYKER 1, STEALTH

#### 0-1 Sump Beast (Cost: 3 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Sump Beast | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+2 | 0 | 32-50mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Sump Beast is equipped with its Toxic Bite. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Toxic Bite.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, GAS, HEAVY

**Abilities**

* **Many Forms.** When you recruit the Sump Beast, roll 1D6. It gains the corresponding result permanently:  
  * 1\. Claws: Gains the Claws weapon, which can be used as an off-hand weapon.  
    * **Claws.** Melee, CRITICAL  
  * 2\. Tail: Gains the Lashing Tail weapon, which can be used as a ranged or off-hand weapon, always using the model’s Melee Skill.  
    * **Lashing Tail.** Melee, BLOCK, WHIP 3”  
  * 3\. Extra Legs: Gains \+1” movement speed and \+1 DICE to all Climb and Dash Success Rolls.  
  * 4\. Prehensile Tongue: Gains the Prehensile Tongue weapon, which uses the model’s Melee Skill.  
    * **Prehensile Tongue.** 4”. This weapon causes no Injury roll. If the wielder hits a target with this weapon that is not LARGE, the model hit is moved in a straight line directly towards the Sump Beast until it is as close as possible.  
  * 5\. Venomous Bite: Toxic Bite attack gains an additional \+1 INJURY DICE.  
  * 6\. Carapace: Gains an Armour of \-1.  
* **Underhive Horror.** When the Sump Beast Charges, it must choose at least one model with the most BLOOD MARKERS, or tied for the most, that is a valid target for that Charge.  
* **Unstoppable.** Injury rolls made against the Sump Beast have \-1 DICE.

**Keywords**  
BEAST, FEAR, LARGE, NO PROMOTION, STRONG, TOUGH
